title: [phase:critique] [family:codex-worker] [provider_hint:codex] Return 3 short bullets: one blocker, one non-blocker, one action to avoid repeating local verification loops for the shadow-continuity transplant.
summary_text: - Blocker: the shadow-continuity classification and `baseline_trio_reason` mutation are duplicated in both [scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L206) and [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1021); transplanting only one path will create policy drift immediately. - Non-blocker: the intended behavior is already pinned on both sides, so this is not a semantics-discovery problem; the repo already asserts that shadow continuity never satisfies baseline trio in [tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L100) and [tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh#L269). - Action: extract the jq/filter + baseline-trio annotation into one shared `scripts/lib` helper and replace the duplicate local/harness assertions with a single fixture-driven contract test, leaving only thin wiring smokes per entrypoint so you stop rerunning the same local verification loop.
